name: AEM Holdings Ltd
summary: AEM Holdings Ltd provides intelligent system testing and handling solutions for semiconductor and electronics companies Asia, North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Central America. It operates through Equipment Systems Solutions, System Level Test & Inspection, Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems, and Test and Measurement Solutions segments. The company offers handling and test equipment; engineering and design services; field support services; and supplies, consumables, maintenance services, upgrade kits, and upgrade engineering for handlers. It also provides automatic measurement and test solutions for communications; and specialized wafer probers that enable the testing for sensors and semiconductors for the automotive, industrial, and consumer sectors. AEM Holdings Ltd is headquartered in Singapore.
